message: I've been reading through the Red Cross hurricane prep guide, and honestly, it's refreshing how straightforward and practical it is—no drama, just solid steps you can actually take. Turns out a lot of storm readiness overlaps with general emergency prep, so if you've already started thinking about having supplies on hand or a communication plan, you're already part way there. What's one storm-season task you've been meaning to tackle but haven't gotten around to yet?
